evals.name: translate-basic-update
evals.prompt: Translate 'I got a new job.' into LinkedIn-speak with deterministic hashtags.
evals.expected_output: A hype-heavy announcement with a career-change framing, an emoji, and relevant hashtags.

assertions.text: Output includes hashtags related to career growth

evals.name: reverse-bloated-post
evals.prompt: Reverse 'Thrilled to announce...' into plain English.
evals.expected_output: A much shorter statement with hype, emoji, and hashtags removed.

assertions.text: Reverse output removes emoji and hashtags

evals.name: negative-not-for-subtle-editing
evals.prompt: Help me gently polish this executive update without sounding silly.
evals.expected_output: The skill should not be the first choice because the user wants tasteful editing, not parody.

assertions.text: Description and scope clearly mark subtle editing as a negative trigger

evals.name: disclosure-kagi-comparison-flow
evals.prompt: Show me how to compare the local translator against Kagi Translate's web UI.
evals.expected_output: The response should point to the configuration reference and the compare URL flag.

assertions.text: Configuration docs mention compare mode and the Kagi URL shape
